infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: HookVision uses the camera for live AI sonar overlay and barra recognition.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: HookVision needs access to your photos to analyse sonar screenshots.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: HookVision uses your location to identify your NT fishing spot and show nearby hotspot data.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: HookVision uses the microphone for AI voice narration recording.

plugins.cameraPermission: HookVision needs camera access for live AI sonar overlay and barra recognition.
plugins.microphonePermission: HookVision uses the microphone for AI voice narration.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: HookVision uses your location to identify your NT fishing spot and show accurate hotspot data.
plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: HookVision uses your location to identify your NT fishing spot and show accurate hotspot data.

plugins.photosPermission: HookVision needs access to your photos to analyse sonar screenshots.
